# Kontext SDK
> Payment lifecycle management for modern fintech

## Install
npm install kontext-sdk

## Quick Start
```typescript
import { Kontext } from 'kontext-sdk';
const ctx = Kontext.init({ projectId: 'my-app', environment: 'production' });
const attempt = await ctx.start({
  workspaceRef: 'acme', appRef: 'pay-agent', archetype: 'treasury',
  intentCurrency: 'USD', settlementAsset: 'USDC', chain: 'base',
  senderRefs: { wallet: '0xSender' }, recipientRefs: { wallet: '0xRecipient' },
  executionSurface: 'sdk',
});
const { receipt } = await ctx.authorize(attempt.attemptId, {
  chain: 'base', token: 'USDC', amount: '5000',
  from: '0xSender', to: '0xRecipient', actorId: 'treasury-agent',
});
```

## 8-Stage Payment Lifecycle
intent -> authorize -> prepare -> transmit -> confirm -> recipient_credit -> reconcile -> retry_or_refund

## SDK Client API
start(), authorize(), record(), broadcast(), confirm(), credit(), fail(), refund(), get(), list(), profile(), configure()

## Policy Engine
OFAC sanctions screening, amount limits, blocklists/allowlists, required metadata, human approval thresholds

## 6 Provider Adapters
EVMAdapter, SolanaAdapter, CircleAdapter, X402Adapter, BridgeAdapter, ModernTreasuryAdapter

## 5 Workspace Profiles
micropayments ($100 max), treasury ($25K), invoicing ($20K), payroll ($15K), cross_border ($10K)

## Pricing
Free: 20,000 payment stage events/month, Base chain
Pro: $0.002/event above 20K free, all chains

## Links
- Docs: https://getkontext.com/docs
- npm: https://npmjs.com/package/kontext-sdk
- GitHub: https://github.com/Legaci-Labs/kontext
- Full Reference: https://getkontext.com/llms-full.txt
